name: Enzo Ferrari
description: The Commendatore. Built Ferrari from a racing passion into a dynasty.

name: Colin Chapman
description: Lotus founder. 'Simplify, then add lightness.' Ruthlessly innovative.

name: Ron Dennis
description: Obsessive attention to detail. Built McLaren into F1's most clinical operation.

name: Frank Williams
description: Fierce independence. Williams Racing became the benchmark for engineering excellence.

name: Jean Todt
description: Systematic and ruthless. Masterminded Ferrari's five consecutive constructors' titles.

name: Flavio Briatore
description: Maverick operator. Got the best from Schumacher at Benetton and Alonso at Renault.

name: Christian Horner
description: Relentless pressure and political instinct. Built Red Bull's golden era.

name: Toto Wolff
description: Ice-cold strategist. Led Mercedes to seven consecutive constructors' championships.

name: Gordon Murray
description: Brabham BT46B and McLaren MP4/4 designer. Ground-effect pioneer.

name: John Barnard
description: Carbon-fibre pioneer at McLaren. Transformed how F1 cars are constructed.

name: Adrian Newey (Williams)
description: Early Newey at Williams — already bending aerodynamic theory to his will.

name: Rory Byrne
description: Ferrari's quiet genius. Designed the F2002 and F2004 — two of the most dominant cars ever.

name: Adrian Newey (Red Bull)
description: The greatest car designer in F1 history. Newey at his peak produced the RB6, RB9, and beyond.

name: James Allison
description: Mercedes technical chief. Masterminded the W11 — possibly the most dominant F1 car ever made.

name: Steve Matchett
description: Benetton mechanic who kept Schumacher's car race-ready. The unsung hero of '94 and '95.

name: Ross Brawn
description: Schumacher's technical brain at Ferrari. Masterminded dozens of race-winning strategies.

name: Jock Clear
description: Villeneuve's, then Button's engineer. Calm under pressure, instinctive tyre reader.

name: Peter Bonnington
description: 'Bono.' Hamilton's race engineer throughout the Mercedes dynasty — the perfect partnership.

name: Gianpiero Lambiase
description: 'GP.' Verstappen's engineer. Keeps Max in check and extracts every tenth on strategy.

name: Riccardo Adami
description: 'Rocky.' Vettel's engineer at Red Bull and Ferrari. Outstanding at car setup.

name: Lotus 72
description: Revolutionary wedge design that dominated the 1970 and 1972 seasons.

name: Tyrrell 006
description: Jackie Stewart's championship machine. Efficient, reliable, beautifully balanced.

name: McLaren MP4/4
description: Won 15 of 16 races in 1988. The most dominant car in F1 history.

name: Williams FW14B
description: Mansell's 1992 title-winner. Active suspension, traction control, semi-automatic gearbox.

name: Ferrari F2004
description: Schumacher won 13 of 18 races. Until 2023 it was the benchmark for a dominant F1 season.

name: Ferrari F2002
description: Schumacher clinched the title with six rounds to spare. A masterpiece of F1 engineering.

name: Mercedes W11
description: Hamilton's 2020 title car. 95% win rate. Benchmarked against the MP4/4 as F1's greatest.

name: Red Bull RB19
description: Verstappen won 21 of 22 races in 2023. The most statistically dominant season in history.

name: Mercedes W05
description: The 2014 car that launched the hybrid era dynasty. Twin power unit advantage was decisive.

name: Red Bull RB9
description: Vettel's 2013 four-peat machine. Won nine consecutive races to end the season.

name: Ross Brawn
description: The greatest strategist in F1 history. The two-stop in Monaco '92. The 2005 pitstop.

name: Nigel Stepney
description: Ferrari's technical operations chief. Oversaw race strategy during the Schumacher dominance.

name: James Vowles
description: Mercedes strategy chief throughout their dominant era. Every undercut was perfectly timed.

name: Tim Schenken
description: Race director turned FIA steward. As a strategy operator, valued calm analytical thinking.

name: Hannah Schmitz
description: Red Bull's race strategy chief. The architect of Verstappen's championship campaigns.

name: Will Courtenay
description: Former Red Bull strategist who joined McLaren. Key to their 2024 resurgence.
